title: White & Icons
description: White & Icons — An aesthetic texture pack for your inventory.
body:
✨ White & Icons: The Ultimate Aesthetic Inventory ✨
Are you tired of the cluttered and boring default Minecraft UI? White & Icons is here to transform your gaming experience with a sleek, minimalist, and artistic touch! 🤍🌑

Why Choose White & Icons?

 • Ultra-Clean UI: A crisp, pure white interface with sharp lines that is easy on the eyes. 🧊

 • Unique Aesthetic Icons: Features adorable pixel cats and iconic anime-inspired figures hidden throughout your menus! 🐈‍⬛🌸

 • High Contrast Design: The perfect balance of black and white makes your items pop like never before. 🔳

 • Custom Hotbar: A stylized hotbar with unique numbering for a professional and organized look. ⌨️

 • Minimalist Vibe: Designed for players who appreciate a "less is more" philosophy without sacrificing style. ☁️
